title: hymenocallis angusta
intro: Hymenocallis angusta, also known as the narrow-leaved spider lily or yellow spider lily, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Hymenocallis, native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenocallis angusta include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urinary issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots can be dried and made into a tea or used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
